announcements.title: sf-pi v0.68.8 — deps: repair package-lock.json drift after dependabot batch merge
announcements.body: deps: repair package-lock.json drift after dependabot batch merge — hard-pin @mistralai/mistralai to 2.2.1 (GHSA-3q49-cfcf-g5fm)

announcements.title: sf-pi requires pi 0.73 or newer
announcements.body: Current sf-pi builds require pi 0.73 or newer. Run `pi update` before upgrading sf-pi; PI_CODING_AGENT_SESSION_DIR remains supported for relocating session storage.
